prompt: I removed 3 story sections from my epic doc. Push changes and clean up the orphaned Sub-Imp subtasks in Jira.
assertions: Lists all orphaned subtasks with their Jira keys and section IDs
Fetches each orphan's issue type via jira.mjs get to verify it's a Sub-* type
Only offers to delete issues with type name starting with 'Sub-' (e.g., Sub-Imp, Sub-Test, Sub-Bug)
Prompts user for confirmation (y/N) before each deletion
On confirmation, calls DELETE API for the subtask
Removes deleted entries from childLinks in sync state
Reports which orphans were deleted vs kept
